description: Time-based workflow management for scheduling and tracking expirations

evals.prompt: How do I schedule an expiration check for deals expiring within 7 days?
evals.expected_output: Expiration check scheduling with date range configuration
assertions: Mentions cron trigger or scheduled event
Demonstrates filtering deals by expiry date

evals.prompt: How do I mark deals as expired when they pass their expiry date?
evals.expected_output: Code to mark expired deals and update their status
assertions: Shows KV storage update for deals

evals.prompt: How do I send notifications for deals expiring soon?
evals.expected_output: Notification setup for expiring deals with multiple time windows

evals.prompt: How can I track which deals are expiring and when?
evals.expected_output: Expiration tracking query and monitoring approach

evals.prompt: How do I automatically deactivate expired referral codes?
assertions: Shows automatic status change to inactive
